title: neanotis foetida
intro: Neanotis foetida, also known as Indian snakeroot, is a plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae, native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its traditional use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Neanotis foetida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Neanotis foetida are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
